diagnosis: The v1 fit constrained the workcell with 22 events from 11 same-file rank moves only; the frozen catalog also holds three cross-file recordings and one diagonal training recording that were excluded by the v1 product-scope filter and never constrained the fit.

Cross-file and diagonal moves span the board laterally, so their events add leverage on board yaw and board center that the rank-only event set cannot provide, and they exercise arm poses that can distinguish the v1 candidate's 18.70-degree shoulder-lift zero offset from an unmodeled geometry error.

The v1 held-out episodes d1-to-d2 and g1-to-g2-redo were opened once and are burned as fresh evidence; the frozen sysid split still holds one never-opened held-out recording, the diagonal c1-to-d2, which supports one fresh kinematic-generalization admission on a move class absent from v1 training.
rationale.extends_not_replaces: pawn_bg_workcell_fit_v1 remains the frozen record of the rank-move fit; this contract widens data scope only and reuses the v1 staged bounded parameterization unchanged

fit.stage_b: planar board center/yaw refit, xy residuals only, bounds +/-0.08 m and +/-15 degrees
fit.stage_c: bounded per-joint zero offsets for shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, full 3D residuals, jointly with stage-B parameters
fit.stage_c_prime: stage C plus a bounded base-height correction and a bounded non-negative reopen-phase timing z nuisance
fit.stage_d: lift-dominant hypothesis: a single shoulder-lift zero offset (bounded 25 degrees) explains the vertical residual; pan/elbow/wrist keep a 3-degree prior; includes the reopen timing nuisance
fit.candidate_selection_rule: among stage C, stage C-prime, and stage D, select the candidate with more train episodes showing selected-piece jaw contact in command-driven replay; tie broken by lower train event RMS; declared before the fresh held-out episode is opened
fit.wrist_roll_offset_fixed_zero_reason: rotation about the gripper axis is unobservable in pinch-point position
fit.range_envelope: per-joint union of the LeRobot calibration sweep and training-episode command/actual excursions, plus 2 degrees margin, applied to the compiled model in memory

data_binding.train_scope: every catalog recording whose folder label parses as a square-to-square pawn move and whose recording id is in the frozen sysid train partition; rank, file, and diagonal move classes all participate
data_binding.held_out_scope: sysid held-out recordings in move-suite scope, minus the recordings already opened by the v1 workcell fit

replay_scoring.method: diagnostic consequence metrics computed directly from the frozen trace-row schema; thresholds are read from the frozen pawn_bg_sim_reward_v1 hard gates so numbers stay comparable, but no frozen gate result or task-success claim is emitted for moves outside the frozen 12-skill table
replay_scoring.board_state_caveat: replays place only the selected piece at the recorded source square; episodes whose destination square is occupied by a different piece in the baseline sparse layout are flagged baseline_destination_square_occupied and summarized separately, because the physical board state of those recordings is not modeled
